desc: Core middle and front-end engineer on ZOME, a large-scale cross-platform product. Flutter UI, native iOS and Android middleware layers, and a SwiftUI/visionOS spatial computing app. Early visionOS developer within the team.
Thesis focused on heuristic search algorithms applied to robotic task planning. Broader studies in AI, distributed systems, and software engineering theory.

Architected and delivered a full e-learning platform — front-end applications and middleware — serving the university's digital education programme. Owned the codebase across maintenance, adaptation, and new feature development.
Personal projects including Chatty Prayers (Blazor AI companion app), PDF Forms (Blazor PDF builder with AcroForm generation), and spatial computing prototypes on visionOS.
